name: Procedural Noise
description: Animated procedural noise backgrounds using value noise with fBm layering — organic shifting color patterns.

ProceduralNoise.description: Animated value noise with fBm: 2 octaves of smooth hash noise, blurred 28x16 grid, cycling through dark/indigo/purple/pink palette
ProceduralNoise.code: function(props){var f=props.frame,W=props.layerSize.width,H=props.layerSize.height,t=f*0.035,N=16,M=28,cw=W/M,ch=H/N;function sm(x){return x*x*(3-2*x);}function h(a,b){var v=Math.sin(a*127.1+b*311.7)*43758.5453;return v-Math.floor(v);}function noise(x,y){var ix=Math.floor(x),iy=Math.floor(y),fx=x-ix,fy=y-iy,ux=sm(fx),uy=sm(fy);return h(ix,iy)*(1-ux)*(1-uy)+h(ix+1,iy)*ux*(1-uy)+h(ix,iy+1)*(1-ux)*uy+h(ix+1,iy+1)*ux*uy;}var cells=[];for(var r=0;r<N;r++){for(var c=0;c<M;c++){var v1=noise(c*0.38+t*0.9,r*0.42+t*0.5),v2=noise(c*0.21+t*0.4+5.3,r*0.31+t*0.7+7.1)*0.5;var v=v1*0.65+v2*0.35;var col=v>0.68?'#e91e63':v>0.5?'#4a148c':v>0.3?'#1a237e':'#000000';cells.push(React.createElement('rect',{key:r*M+c,x:Math.floor(c*cw),y:Math.floor(r*ch),width:Math.ceil(cw)+1,height:Math.ceil(ch)+1,fill:col}));}}return React.createElement('svg',{xmlns:'http://www.w3.org/2000/svg',width:W,height:H},React.createElement('defs',null,React.createElement('filter',{id:'pnb'},React.createElement('feGaussianBlur',{stdDeviation:'28'}))),React.createElement('rect',{x:0,y:0,width:W,height:H,fill:'#000000'}),React.createElement('g',{filter:'url(#pnb)'},cells));}
